description:
Perform a perioperative medication safety screen for a patient on Imatinib. Using the Liverpool Cancer iChart app, check the interaction safety for these four common post-op medications:

1. Fentanyl (Opioid Analgesic)
2. Midazolam (Sedative/Anxiolytic)
3. Ibuprofen (NSAID)
4. Paracetamol (Non-Opioid Analgesic)

Navigate to 'Imatinib' as the cancer drug, then find each co-medication in its respective category (or via search) to identify the traffic light color code (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, or Grey). 

Create a report file at '/sdcard/postop_screen.txt' with the exact format:
Imatinib Interaction Report
Fentanyl: [COLOR]
Midazolam: [COLOR]
Ibuprofen: [COLOR]
Paracetamol: [COLOR]
